title: Shor's Algorithm: The Quantum Threat to Public-Key Cryptography
description: Understand how Shor's algorithm breaks RSA, ECC, and Diffie-Hellman. Learn the mathematics behind this quantum breakthrough and why it poses an existential threat to current cryptographic infrastructure.
learningObjectives: Explain what Shor's algorithm does and why it matters
Describe how quantum computers solve integer factorization efficiently
Understand the impact on RSA, Diffie-Hellman, and elliptic curve cryptography
Analyze the quantum speedup: exponential to polynomial
Evaluate the requirements for running Shor's algorithm at scale
Assess which cryptographic systems are vulnerable
